title: mammillaria crucigera subsp. tlalocii
intro: Mammillaria crucigera subsp. tlalocii is a species of flowering cactus native to Mexico, characterized by its unique, globular shape and vibrant yellow flowers. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Mexican medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mammillaria crucigera subsp. tlalocii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in tea form or as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
